html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Brick Flooring is an alternate version of Cobblestones. It differs only in texture, description and method of obtaining the prototype. Its rare Blueprint is obtained by feeding the Red Crown to the Antlion.

Brick Flooring allow players to lay down their own Roads. Similar to natural Roads, it will speed up the player by 30%. Brick Flooring can be moved using the Pitchfork.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can't be planted on these Turfs, unless they were planted before the Turfs were placed. It will also stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

Trivia

  • Brick Flooring was added as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover.
TurfsCraftable Items

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can't be planted on these Turfs, unless they were planted before the Turfs were placed. It will also stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sàn gạch là phiên bản thay thế của Đá cuội. Nó chỉ khác nhau về kết cấu, mô tả và phương pháp lấy nguyên mẫu. Bản thiết kế quý hiếm của nó có được bằng cách cho Kiến Sư tử ăn Vương miện đỏ.

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}}
'''Brick Flooring''' is an alternate version of [[Cobblestones]]. It differs only in texture, description and method of obtaining the prototype. Its rare [[Blueprint]] is obtained by feeding the [[Red Crown]] to the [[Antlion]].

Brick Flooring allow players to lay down their own [[Roads]]. Similar to natural Roads, it will [[Player Speed|speed up]] the player by 30%. Brick Flooring can be moved using the [[Pitchfork]].

Plants like [[Berry Bush|Berry Bushes]], [[Grass Tuft|Grass Tufts]], [[Saplings]], [[Spiky Bush|Spiky Bushes]], [[Pine Cone|Pine Cones]], and [[Birchnut|Birchnuts]] can't be planted on these Turfs, unless they were planted before the Turfs were placed. It will also stop the [[Lureplants]]' [[Lureplant#Eyeplant|Eyeplants]] from spawning.

When placed on the [[Surface World]] covering a large enough area, [[Crow]]s are the only [[Birds]] that will spawn and land on these turfs.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Brick Flooring was added as part of the [[Cult of the Lamb Crossover]].
